items.title: Nepal's ex-PM arrested over fatal protest crackdown
items.dek: More than 70 people were killed during an uprising last year which ousted Oli's government.
items.body: More than 70 people were killed during an uprising last year which ousted Oli's government.

items.title: Eye drops made of pig semen deliver cancer treatment to mice.

items.title: From jammed broadcasts to a blocked website: BBC Russian's 80 years of defiance
items.dek: For half a century, BBC Russian had to fend off jammers. Now its website is blocked, but millions still read it.
items.body: For half a century, BBC Russian had to fend off jammers. Now its website is blocked, but millions still read it.
